description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeved, one-piece athletic suit that covers the torso and upper thighs, featuring a glossy finish and subtle paneling details. The suit appears to be made of a synthetic, slightly reflective material, giving it a sleek and modern look. The figure is barefoot, with well-defined feet and toes visible. His facial features are realistic, and he has short, styled hair with a neatly groomed appearance. The overall posture and attire suggest he is prepared for physical activity or urban movement.
description: A muscular adult male in a fitted, glossy athletic suit, standing upright and barefoot with short, styled hair. The figure has realistic features and a modern, active appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, chest, and the front paneling of the athletic suit, with arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the suit's fit along the torso and thigh.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the suit's back paneling, as well as the backs of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, arm, and the suit's fit along the body.
